name: Camouflage
description: Blends into surroundings and gains stealth bonuses.

name: Gills
description: Allows better water movement and aquatic survival.

name: Flight
description: Can access elevated or otherwise unreachable areas.

name: Luminous
description: Emits a gentle glow in dark areas.

name: Fins
description: Adds stronger aquatic movement and deep-water access.

name: Wings
description: Adds flight or glide potential for elevated access.

name: Bright Eyes
description: Improves awareness, scouting, and night activity.

name: Odd Coloration
description: Unusual coloration that may affect stealth, display, or breeding value.

name: Spore-Touched
description: A fungal mutation with unpredictable uses and risks.

name: Night Vision
description: Improves movement and scouting in dark locations.
